name: Adjustable Wrench
description: A sturdy adjustable wrench for zero-G repairs, typical of Nordgrip's rugged quality.

name: Wrench Set
description: A comprehensive set of gear-head metric wrenches.

name: Power Screwdriver Set
description: An electric screwdriver and bit set. Suitable for most small fasteners found on ship access panels.

name: Electrical Service Tool Kit
description: A small case of specialised wire strippers, crimping and interconnect assembly tools. A well worn laser solder tool has been jammed inside the case, it is clearly not a part of the original toolkit

name: High Voltage Tool Kit
description: A worn case of insulated hand tools complete with burn marks, including a Megohmmeter, HV multimeter and 1000V insulated gloves. Essential tools to avoid being fried while working on high voltage systems.

name: Small Socket Set
description: A small case of sockets, ratchets and adapters for small to medium metric fasteners.

name: Large Socket Set
description: A case of oversize sockets, ratchets and adapters for large metric fasteners. Built Nordgrip tough

name: Scan Tool
description: A hand-held tablet based scan tool incorporating diagnostic logic, oscilloscope, and thermal imaging with augmented reality overlays. Upgradable with additional diagnostic manuals.
installed_manuals: SMC Nova TS1500 Security Door Panel
SMC Nova Q-Emerald Security Door Panel
